title: fix: use nested file_changes schema and add strict TypedDicts
body: The Markdown formatter expected a nested `file_changes` shape, but the prompt schema still emitted a flat `changes` key, so briefings rendered with missing file sections. Introduce PRBriefing / FileChange / ChangeDetail / RiskAssessment TypedDicts so the response shape is explicit and the formatter and prompt can no longer drift apart.
commit_messages: fix: using wrong dict key, implement more robust type checking
